top_signals.title: Senior Ukrainian commander sees imminent ‘turning point’ in war
top_signals.summary: Ukraine has a six-month window in which to seize the battlefield initiative from Russia and strengthen its hand for peace talks, a senior commander said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cash App lets users send USDC stablecoins on chains like Solana and Ethereum
top_signals.summary: Cash App users can now transfer on Solana, Ethereum, Polygon and Arbitrum, but executive Miles Suter says the firm is still bitcoin-focused.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ‘Nameless’: Cursed killer goes wild in uneven thriller
top_signals.summary: Director Hideo Jojo borrows from horror classics while pitting Jiro Sato's unhinged killer against a dogged veteran cop.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
